example: I work as an accountant for a company.
I am in charge of working with clients.
I do part-time jobs at the weekends.
I applied for a job at a local hospital.
This company has good opportunities for promotion.
Sometimes I have to work overtime and feel tired.

vietnamese: hợp tác với phòng ban khác
example: I collaborate with other departments to run the business.

vietnamese: áp dụng kiến thức và kỹ năng
example: I can apply the knowledge I studied in my work.

vietnamese: đồng nghiệp thân thiện và hỗ trợ
example: My co-workers are friendly and always help me.
The salary for this job is quite attractive.
This job requires at least two years of experience.
I have a job interview tomorrow morning.
Good teamwork is essential in any workplace.
I updated my CV before applying for the job.
